summary: 3 film announcements, 2 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Hope
film.announcement: Director Na Hong-Jin showcased new footage at Comic-Con and discussed casting Hoyeon as his 'best decision' for the project.

film.title: Weapons
film.announcement: Zach Cregger teased a prequel to Weapons focusing on Gladys' origin story with a 'crazy' approach, providing script updates at Comic-Con.

film.title: Ebenezer
film.announcement: First trailer released for Ti West's Ebenezer featuring Johnny Depp's return.

tv.title: Thunder Road
tv.announcement: Devon Allman cast in his first major acting role in the NASCAR drama series.

tv.title: Stuart Fails to Save the Universe
tv.announcement: Comic-Con panel teased a DC episode with original character OG returning to the Big Bang Theory franchise spinoff.
